Name: Missed Trip Rate by Route — Poojith

CalculatedFields.Name: month_name
CalculatedFields.Expression:
ifelse(
  calendarmonth = 1, 'Jan',
  calendarmonth = 2, 'Feb',
  calendarmonth = 3, 'Mar',
  calendarmonth = 4, 'Apr',
  calendarmonth = 5, 'May',
  calendarmonth = 6, 'Jun',
  calendarmonth = 7, 'Jul',
  calendarmonth = 8, 'Aug',
  calendarmonth = 9, 'Sep',
  calendarmonth = 10, 'Oct',
  calendarmonth = 11, 'Nov',
  calendarmonth = 12, 'Dec',
  'Unknown'
)
